mapper.insert: INSERT INTO board_posts ( designer_id, title, content, created_at ) VALUES ( #{designerId}, #{title}, #{content}, NOW() )
mapper.select:
SELECT p.id, p.designer_id AS designerId, d.name AS designerName, p.title, p.content, p.created_at AS createdAt
FROM board_posts p JOIN designers d ON p.designer_id = d.id
ORDER BY p.created_at DESC
LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.update: UPDATE board_posts SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
